name: MaintenanceDeluxe
overview: Premium maintenance overlay with live countdown and rich release notes.
description: Premium cinema-themed maintenance overlay for Jellyfin. Full-screen velours-and-gold overlay with a drifting aurora background, a rotating film-reel logo, crackling ember particles and a brushed-metal card border. Live countdown adapts to the remaining time, time-based progress bar turns amber when you overshoot the window. Admin-configurable release notes (icon + title + markdown body, up to 20 sections), emoji palette, markdown live preview, character counters. Preview button renders the overlay with your real saved settings without activating maintenance. Graceful three-tier performance degradation for TV clients.

versions.changelog: v0.1.7 - Preview uses your real saved config (title, subtitle, release notes) — no more mock content. Admin UI release-note rows have fixed columns so they stop shifting when you type. Emoji palette of common icons under the icon input. README and docs rewritten.
